task_completion.description: The agent opens and reads the product_data.json file to extract formulation and hazard information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal (e.g., cat command), or file viewer displaying the JSON content of product_data.json.

task_completion.description: The agent creates a document with the 16 standard GHS sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An OpenOffice Writer document showing multiple numbered sections (1 through 16) typical of a Safety Data Sheet.

task_completion.description: The agent formats the section headers using the 'Heading 1' style.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenOffice Writer formatting toolbar or Styles pane shows 'Heading 1' selected when a section header is active, or headers are visibly formatted as Heading 1.

task_completion.description: Section 2 of the document includes Hazard Statements (H-codes) and Precautionary Statements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text under Section 2 showing H-codes (like H290, H314) and corresponding precautionary statements.

task_completion.description: Section 3 contains a table listing chemical ingredients, CAS numbers, and concentrations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table under Section 3 with columns for ingredients, CAS numbers, and concentrations, including Sodium Hydroxide, 2-Butoxyethanol, Sodium Metasilicate, and Water.

task_completion.description: The document includes a footer with the current revision date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bottom margin of the document contains a footer area displaying a revision date.

task_completion.description: The document is saved as SDS_ApexSolv5000.odt in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenOffice Writer window title bar displays 'SDS_ApexSolv5000.odt' or a save dialog shows this filename and the /home/ga/Documents/ path.

integrity.description: The agent used Apache OpenOffice Writer to create and edit the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenOffice Writer GUI being used, rather than a terminal text editor or a script generating the file.

integrity.description: The agent manually applied formatting, inserted tables, and added footers using the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Interaction with OpenOffice Writer menus, toolbars, or dialog boxes for styles, tables, or page settings (footers).

integrity.description: The agent progressively built the document content.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document is seen in various stages of completion across multiple screenshots, rather than appearing fully formed instantly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The product 'Apex-Solv 5000' contains four ingredients: Sodium Hydroxide (CAS 1310-73-2), 2-Butoxyethanol (CAS 111-76-2), Sodium Metasilicate (CAS 6834-92-0), and Water (CAS 7732-18-5). The hazard classification includes H290 (May be corrosive to metals) and H314 (Causes severe skin burns and eye damage). The document must have exactly 16 sections, a table in Section 3, and be saved as SDS_ApexSolv5000.odt.
